_comment: The arming switch for the Formal-index non-empty description-field gate (guardrails/check-description-field.py, SPEC INV-239/M-421). The gate reds a registered code whose description field is empty. It armed in the back-describe migration landing (v3.0.0, 2026-07-20) that gave every registered code its plain-description field, so from that landing the gate enforces a non-empty Description column for every code in the Formal index.
reason: RETIRED at the row-445 requirements-format conversion with its stated successor (stage-1 design, docs/prover/2026-07-22-row445-spec-format-delta.md): the criteria and the glossary are the authored home of every code's plain statement, and the generated index (PRODUCT_SPEC.index.md / the spec's ## Reference table, guardrails/check-index-generated.py) carries locations only — there is no description column left for this gate to read. It was armed from the back-describe landing v3.0.0 until this conversion.
